topic.what: Higher-order masked implementations of small-pSquare TBC over Fp with complete formal verification and physical silicon evaluation
topic.how: Extends SILVER/MATCHI/PROLEAD for prime-field verification via F2 synthesis wrapper, introduces Privium PRNG for Fp randomness, fixes incomplete modulo reduction 0-issue, tapes out 65nm ASIC with TVLA leakage assessment
topic.why_matters: Prime-field masking offers improved noise resistance and stronger security per share than binary masking but lacked automated verification tools and efficient constant-time randomness generation, blocking practical adoption

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of shares d achieving glitch-robust probing security
characteristics.evidence: SILVER formal verification confirms glitch-robust t-PINI for t=d-1
characteristics.context: Full verification for d=2,3; d=4 via PROLEAD simulation with probing verified for 2-7 Mersenne exponents

characteristics.what_it_measures: Whether security proof covers all possible circuit states
characteristics.evidence: SILVER/MATCHI exhaustive for d≤3; PROLEAD statistical for d=4
characteristics.context: 4-share SILVER verification exceeded 100h on 256GB RAM/128 vCPUs

characteristics.what_it_measures: Gate equivalents for masked small-pSquare core
characteristics.evidence: Table 5 post-layout synthesis for 65nm at 50MHz worst-case
characteristics.context: Increases ~2.6x from d=2 to d=4; excludes Privium overhead

characteristics.what_it_measures: Total area including Privium randomness generator
characteristics.evidence: Table 5 combined area for small-pSquare + Privium
characteristics.context: Privium occupies 23-37% of total area depending on share count

characteristics.evidence: F-serialized two-stage pipelined architecture; constant across all d
characteristics.context: Initialization adds 4-24 cycles for Privium depending on unrolling factor

characteristics.evidence: Post-layout delay 8.8-9.05ns enables 100MHz+ at typical conditions

characteristics.what_it_measures: Statistical order of detected leakage via TVLA
characteristics.value: none detected for d≥3 at 100M traces
characteristics.evidence: TVLA with threshold abs(t)>4.5, 100M traces per implementation
characteristics.context: No conclusively detectable leakage for 3-share and 4-share implementations

characteristics.what_it_measures: Area increase from complete vs incomplete reductions
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 area comparison for squaring gadgets with d=2,3,4
characteristics.context: Gamma version achieves security with 0.1% overhead vs alpha
